title: cedrus libani var. stenocoma
intro: Cedrus libani var. stenocoma, also known as Atlas Cedar, is a variant of the Atlas Cedar tree (Cedrus libani), native to the Atlas Mountains in North Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, attributed to the presence of cedrol and other terpenes. The health benefits of Cedrus libani var. stenocoma include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a herbal tea, to harness its medicinal properties.
